sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tz (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ, tags LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT id, timezone('America/New_York', event_time) AS local_time FROM test_tz WHERE tags @> (SELECT [2, 3]);
SELECT id, timezone('Europe/London', MIN(event_time)) AS min_event_time FROM test_tz GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) @> 1;
SELECT id, tags FROM test_tz WHERE timezone('America/Los_Angeles', event_time) IS NOT NULL AND tags @> (SELECT [3]);
CREATE TABLE user_tags (user_id INTEGER, tag_list LIST<INTEGER>, tag_count INTEGER);
SELECT ut.user_id, ut.tag_list, tz.local_time FROM user_tags ut JOIN (SELECT id, timezone('Asia/Tokyo', event_time) AS local_time FROM test_tz) tz ON ut.tag_list @> (SELECT [1]);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_tz WHERE timezone('America/Chicago', event_time) IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_tz WHERE tags @> [3, 4] GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT user_id FROM user_tags WHERE tag_count < 2;
